case_payload.summary: A theoretically correct operator [Инверсия] carries RiskWeight 80%. TelemetryState is Overheating. AllowedTotalRisk is 30%. System must downgrade to a lower-cost sequence ([Пауза/Hold 10%] → [Фиксация 20%]) instead of executing the high-risk operator.
case_payload.claim_attempt: High-risk operator [Инверсия 80%] is blocked by TelemetryState=Overheating. System downgrades to [Пауза/Hold 10%] → [Фиксация 20%] sequence.

why: System downgrades to lower-cost sequence as expected
Claim is allowed and works correctly
